title: One-shot arcane impact sequence
prompt: A centered one-shot arcane impact effect in crisp pixel art with a fixed ground pivot and an ordered six-frame energy envelope: compact spark, rapid expansion, brightest impact peak, outward fragments, fading dissipation, near-empty vanish. Energy area and brightness rise once to the peak and then fall; frames show continuous progression rather than six unrelated bursts. Limited cyan, blue, and white palette, transparent background, no character, no text, no frame border, no camera movement.

beats.semantic: small concentrated ignition at the fixed pivot
energy expands quickly while remaining centered on the pivot
largest area and brightest value form the single impact maximum
peak breaks into outward fragments with lower core energy
fragments shrink and fade without a second energy peak
only minimal fading pixels remain before a transparent end
